name: Sebek zigvolt
description:
Idk about yall but it’s the middle of march and I am FREEZING. Gotta love cali weather :3

Anyway since his birthday is coming up and it’s really freaking cold, i decided to make this.

Shout out to the three other Sebek fans out there, real ones.

Summary: Sebek’s worst enemy as a half cold blooded fae is cold weather...who knew? Anyway he’s not about to look weak in front of Wakasama!...and a certain human that he definitely does NOT like in any way shape or form...totally.

This is where I would go on my usual yap session but honestly idk what to talk about...erm. I love twst? Is it obvious chat? Sebek is honestly such a cutie patootie.

As always leave reviews and requests (see rules on my profile) stay safe, my bars :3333
creator: Marsandbungo
